overview: An AI-based traffic management system with four role-based dashboards (Emergencies, Control Panel, Traffic Police, User), featuring simulated live maps with geolocation, AI traffic prediction chatboards, incident management, vehicle dispatch, and dynamic routing — all in near real-time.
features: 4 role-based dashboards: Emergencies, Control Panel, Traffic Police, User
Simulated live traffic map with browser geolocation
Control Panel: vehicle management and incident override
Traffic Police: signal control and incident management
User: route planning with congestion warnings
Role-based registration with ID proof file upload
